items.name: Adurite Guitar of Rock Excellence
items.description: Rock out on this ulta-rare adurite guitar. It vibrates at a frequency to make tunes sound extra sweet. Use the keys: 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N', and 'M' to play different tunes. Hold shift while pressing to sharpen the notes.
